heading: CUSB क्या है? / What is CUSB?
preview:
### CUSB क्या है? / What is CUSB?
Central University of South Bihar ek central university hai jo Gaya, Bihar me sthit hai.  
*Central University of South Bihar is a central university located in Gaya,

heading: CUSB किस प्रकार की university है?
preview:
### CUSB किस प्रकार की university है?
Ye ek Central University hai jo Government of India ke under aati hai.

heading: Campus कैसा है?
preview:
### Campus कैसा है?
CUSB ka campus modern aur eco-friendly hai. *The campus is modern and eco-friendly.*

preview: ## 🎓 2. प्रवेश प्रक्रिया (Admission Process)

heading: Mode of Admission
preview:
### Mode of Admission
Online

heading: Entrance Exam
preview:
### Entrance Exam
CUET (Common University Entrance Test) for UG & PG courses

heading: Admission Steps
preview:
### Admission Steps
1. Apply for CUET entrance examination.
2. Appear in the CUET exam.
3. University prepares merit list based on CUET score and cut-off.
4. Selected candidates receive admission offe

heading: CUET kya hai?
preview:
### CUET kya hai?
CUET ek national level entrance exam hai. *CUET is a national-level entrance exam.*

- Security fee paid only once in first year. From next year only hostel fee (₹9,000) and maintenance fee (₹1,000).

heading: 🏢 4. होस्टल सुविधाएँ (Hostel Facilities)
preview: ## 🏢 4. होस्टल सुविधाएँ (Hostel Facilities)

heading: Availability
preview:
### Availability
Yes, hostel available for both boys and girls.

heading: Hostel Duration Policy
preview:
### Hostel Duration Policy
Students must vacate hostel after one year and reapply for next academic year.

heading: Hostel Allocation Policy
preview:
### Hostel Allocation Policy

| Criteria | Details |
|----------|---------|
| Allocation Basis | CGPA merit |
| Department Reservation | ~10% per department |
| Priority | Top 10% students |
